_template: handoff/04-promote/header-spec.json — written by header-composer (Phase 4-lite). The reproducibility contract: scripts/make_header.py renders the identical PNG from this spec. Schema by variant below; delete the _template/_comment keys in real specs.
_comment_editorial: variant=editorial: kicker, badge, headline (list of lines; each line = list of {text, color: ink|accent} segments — at most ONE accent word in the whole headline), figure {file, caption, max [w,h], top}, strip (4-6 UPPERCASE tokens).
_comment_numbers: variant=numbers: kicker, kicker_right, old_value, old_caption, new_value, new_caption (strip is replaced by the built-in staircase motif).
note: one line: which variant was chosen over which, and why
